full_text:
Yan Jun (Mancai) 嚴畯 (曼才)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yan Jun (嚴畯), styledMancai (曼才). Refused appointment as Lu Su’s successor. He was unable to ride a horse. Yan Jun was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Yan Jun lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
